aboutUs:
At Four, we believe in the power of connection. Our platform was created to help people come together—whether for social events, sports, or any occasion where collaboration matters. We understand that finding the right people for your activities can be a challenge, and that’s why Four exists: to make it easier, faster, and more convenient to organize and participate in events with like-minded individuals.
Our mission is simple: to bring people together by offering a seamless way to create and join events or appointments. Whether you need extra players for a game, want to organize a meet-up, or are just looking to connect with others for a common interest, Four is here to make it happen.
We prioritize user safety and privacy, offering a secure space for you to meet new people, while providing tools to help you make informed decisions about who you interact with. Your trust is important to us, and we are constantly working to improve and innovate the platform to ensure the best experience for our users.
Join the Four community today and discover how easy it can be to connect with others, organize events, and make meaningful connections.

description.title: Description
description.placeholder: Write your message or describe your issue.

contacts.description: We appreciate your feedback and are here to assist with any questions or concerns. Please complete the form below, and our support team will respond promptly. By submitting, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy. Your privacy is important to us, and your information will not be shared with third parties.

faqs.title: How Does it Work?
faqs.description: Four lets you create cards for events, specific needs, or appointments, including details like time, location, and the number of participants needed. Others can view these cards and send requests to join. The person who created the card reviews the requests and picks who they want. Once confirmed, the selected participants can chat to coordinate and agree on the details before joining the event or appointment.

faqs.title: How do I create a card for an event or appointment?
faqs.description: Creating a card is simple! On the main screen, select the New Request option. You’ll need to provide details such as the event’s subject, a description of your request, time, and location, along with the number of participants needed. Once all the information is filled in, your card will be posted for others to see and join.

faqs.title: Can I edit or delete a card after it’s been created?
faqs.description: You can edit or delete a card as long as no one has requested to join. Once the first participant sends a request, you won’t be able to edit or delete the card.

faqs.title: How do I view and join events or appointments?
faqs.description: You can view events and appointments either on a map or in a table format. The platform also offers sorting options, allowing you to prioritize nearby participants or apply other filters to find the right event for you. Once you find an event you’re interested in, you can click on it to see more details and send a request to join.

faqs.title: What happens after I send a request to join an event?
faqs.description: After you send a request, the creator of the card can review it and decide whom to select. If you’re chosen, you’ll be able to coordinate with the card creator via chat to finalize the details.

faqs.title: How do I communicate with other participants?
faqs.description: Once you’re selected, you can only communicate with the card creator through chat. All further coordination will be done via them.

faqs.title: How are participants selected for an event?
faqs.description: The card creator reviews the received requests and selects participants based on various criteria such as  timing, the number of requests, the profiles of the applicants, and the content of the messages sent by the participants.

faqs.title: Can I cancel my participation in an event?
faqs.description: After the card creator confirms your participation, you’ll communicate in a private chat room. If you can’t reach an agreement, either party can close the chat and cancel their participation.

faqs.title: What if no one responds to my card request?
faqs.description: If no one responds to your card request, you can update the card with additional details. However, you cannot extend the request’s deadline. Once the card’s time expires, you can create a new card. Additionally, consider exploring other strategies to attract more participants.

faqs.title: Is there a way to rate or review participants?
faqs.description: After the card creator confirms participation, both parties can rate each other in the chat room. If any misconduct occurs, they can report it to support directly through the chat page.

faqs.title: How does Four handle user privacy and data security?
faqs.description: Four takes user privacy and data security very seriously. Personal data is encrypted and securely stored. Access to this data is restricted to authorized personnel only, and all interactions on the platform are conducted over secure channels. Additionally, Four complies with relevant data protection regulations to ensure user information is handled with the highest standards of security and confidentiality.

privacies.title: introduction
privacies.description: At Four, your privacy and data security are of utmost importance to us. This Privacy Policy outlines how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.

privacies.title: Information We Collect
privacies.description: We collect information you provide directly to us, including your name, email address, phone number, and any other information you choose to share. We may also collect data on your interactions with the platform, such as event details and participation requests.

privacies.title: How We Use Your Information
privacies.description: We use your information to facilitate your use of the platform, including managing event participation, sending notifications, and improving our services. Your information may also be used for customer support and to communicate with you about important updates.

privacies.title: Data Security
privacies.description: We implement robust security measures to protect your data from unauthorized access, loss, or disclosure. Your personal information is encrypted and stored securely.

privacies.title: Sharing Your Information
privacies.description: We do not share your personal information with third parties except as necessary to provide our services, comply with legal obligations, or protect our rights. We may share aggregated, non-identifiable data for analysis and improvement of our platform.

privacies.title: Your Rights
privacies.description: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal information. You can also opt-out of receiving promotional communications from us.

privacies.title: Changes to This Policy
privacies.description: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date.

privacies.title: Contact Us
privacies.description: If you have any questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us at [support@four.io].

terms.title: introduction
terms.description: Welcome to Four! By using our platform, you agree to the following terms and conditions. Please read them carefully.

terms.title: Acceptance of Terms
terms.description: By accessing or using Four, you agree to comply with and be bound by these Terms of Service and our Privacy Policy. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you should not use our platform.

terms.title: Use of the Platform
terms.description: You agree to use Four only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these terms. You must not:  Use the platform in any way that may damage, disable, overburden, or impair our services. Engage in any activity that interferes with or disrupts the platform or its servers. Use automated systems to access the platform without authorization.

terms.title: Account Responsibility
terms.description: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account information, including your username and password. You agree to notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account.

terms.title: Content and Conduct
terms.description: You are solely responsible for the content you create and share on Four. You must ensure that your content complies with Canadian laws and does not infringe on the rights of others. Any illegal or harmful content will be dealt with according to Canadian law. Four is not responsible for such content but will take action by blocking users who report it.

terms.title: Intellectual Property
terms.description: All content and materials provided on Four are the property of Four or its licensors. You may not reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works from any content without prior written permission.

terms.title: Termination
terms.description: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account and access to Four at our sole discretion, without notice, if you violate these terms or for any other reason.

terms.title: Limitation of Liability
terms.description: Four is provided as is and as available without any warranties of any kind. We are not liable for any damages or losses arising from your use of the platform.

terms.title: Changes to Terms
terms.description: We may update these Terms of Service from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date. Your continued use of Four constitutes your acceptance of the revised terms.

terms.title: Governing Law
terms.description: These terms are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Canada. Any disputes arising under these terms shall be resolved in the courts of Canada.

terms.title: Disclaimer of Responsibility
terms.description: Four is not responsible for the execution of events, disputes, issues, or any inappropriate behavior by users. The platform serves solely as a means of connection and does not guarantee user conduct. It is your responsibility to assess users based on their ratings, history, and profiles. Four disclaims any liability for issues arising from user interactions.

terms.title: Contact Us
terms.description: If you have any questions or concerns about these Terms of Service, please contact us at [support@four.io].

testimonials.description: Four has revolutionized how I organize events. It’s simple to post my needs and get quick responses. The user-friendly interface and location-based sorting make it incredibly effective. Highly recommended for easy event planning!
testimonials.name: Adrian Sinclair

testimonials.description: Four has made managing event cards effortless. The direct communication with participants helps coordinate details smoothly. It’s become my favorite app for organizing events.
testimonials.name: Eloise Harrington

testimonials.description: Four is perfect for organizing sports and social gatherings. Seeing nearby participants and using the rating system is fantastic. It’s more than an app; it’s a community builder.
testimonials.name: Thaddeus Moreau

testimonials.description: Four makes connecting with like-minded people easy. Whether it’s for a game or a casual meetup, it simplifies the process. The clean interface and helpful support team are bonuses.
testimonials.name: Seraphina Caldwell

testimonials.description: Four has been amazing for my dating life. It’s easy to find people with similar interests and values. The location and interest filters help me make meaningful connections, and the chat feature is great for getting to know matches before meeting in person. It’s made dating simpler and more enjoyable.
testimonials.name: Isolde Montgomery

index.description: Discover where your story begins. Choose your partners of the same interests.

petSettingsReasonToGetDate: Knowing if you have a pet allows us to pair you with people who are comfortable with or share similar experiences, making meetups more enjoyable for everyone involved.
workoutSettingsReasonToGetDate: Sharing your workout routine helps us connect you with people who have similar fitness goals, making it easier to plan active or health-oriented events together.
